zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Cliff於1227年出生在英國英格蘭。他與Alice fitz Henry of Ravensworth結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Cliff于1227年出生在英国英格兰。他与Alice fitz Henry of Ravensworth结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cliff
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

variants.name: Cleave
meanings: English (Devon and Cornwall): variant of   Cliff  .

variants.name: Cliffe
meanings: English: variant, common in Ireland, of   Cliff  .

variants.name: Clifton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Clive
meanings: English (Warwickshire): variant of   Cliff  . The name is also found in Wigtownshire, Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Cliff was born in 1227, in England, United Kingdom. He married Alice fitz Henry of Ravensworth. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Cliff est né en 1227, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Alice fitz Henry of Ravensworth. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Cliff wurde 1227 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat Alice fitz Henry of Ravensworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Cliff è nato il nel 1227 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Alice fitz Henry of Ravensworth. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Cliffは1227年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。Alice fitz Henry of Ravensworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Cliff(은)는 1227년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 Alice fitz Henry of Ravensworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Cliff nasceu em 1227, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Alice fitz Henry of Ravensworth. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Cliff родился в 1227 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice fitz Henry of Ravensworth. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Cliff nació en 1227, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Alice fitz Henry of Ravensworth. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
